zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Héron於大約1260年出生在英國諾圖波藍德福特時，他的父親William Heron22歲，母親Christian Notton22歲。他與Elizabeth de Swinburne結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年3月15日在英國諾圖波藍德福特享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德班包。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Héron于大约1260年出生在英国諾圖波藍德福特时，他的父亲William Heron22岁，母亲Christian Notton22岁。他与Elizabeth de Swinburne结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年3月15日在英国諾圖波藍德福特享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德班包。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Héron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Héron was born about 1260, in Ford, Northumberland, England, his father, William Heron, was 22 and his mother, Christian Notton, was 22. He married Elizabeth de Swinburne. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 March 1333, in Ford, Northumberland, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Bamburgh, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Héron est né environ 1260, à Ford, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Heron, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Christian Notton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Swinburne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 mars 1333, à Ford, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Bamburgh, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Héron um 1260 in Ford, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Heron 22 und seine Mutter Christian Notton 22. Er hat Elizabeth de Swinburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. März 1333 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Ford, Northumberland, England und wurde in Bamburgh, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth de Swinburne. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 marzo 1333, nel Ford, Northumberland, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Bamburgh, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Héronが約1260年にイギリスノースウンバーランドフォードで生まれた時，父William Heronは22歳，母Christian Nottonは22歳であった。Elizabeth de Swinburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1333年3月15日にイギリスノースウンバーランドフォードで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドバンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Héron(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 노르스벌랜드 포드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Heron(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Notton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Swinburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 3월 15일 영국 노르스벌랜드 포드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 바버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Héron nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Heron, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Christian Notton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Swinburne. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de março de 1333, em Ford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Bamburgh, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Héron родился около 1260 г. в местности форд, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William Heron было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Christian Notton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Swinburne. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 марта 1333 г. в местности форд, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности бамбург, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.
